overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic waterfront promenade on a clear morning. The character passes through a covered underpass lined with vending machines and neon advertisements, with the camera briefly dipping to water level to showcase ray-traced reflections of the surrounding architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade carrying a briefcase, approaching a covered underpass ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction toward the underpass

entered.detail: calm water canal reflecting the surrounding architecture
multi-level highway structure crossing over the water
tall modern glass and steel towers in the distance
tropical palm trees lining the promenade
textured concrete wall with horizontal lines

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open waterfront promenade in a futuristic city, with a calm canal on the right reflecting elevated highways and distant skyscrapers. Palm trees and concrete walls line the path as the character approaches a covered underpass ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass entrance with vending machines

events.description: enters the covered underpass from the open waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered underpass area, passing rows of vending machines on the left wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead deeper into the underpass

entered.detail: concrete bridge underpass with metal railings and support beams
row of colorful automated vending machines with graffiti
concrete wall covered in blue and white graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered underpass where the lighting shifts to a mix of natural and artificial. The open sky gives way to concrete overhead as vending machines and graffiti-covered walls line the left side, while the canal remains visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit underpass corridor with digital advertisements

events.description: ambient lighting shifts to vibrant neon illumination from advertisement screens
approaching the exit of the underpass, bright daylight visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit corridor, passing glowing advertisement screens and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket leaning against wall near vending machines
child in red shirt running ahead toward the exit

entered.detail: large illuminated digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements and product images

segments.scene_description: Deep within the underpass, vibrant neon advertisements cast colorful light on the concrete walls. The character passes vending machines and pedestrians, including a child running ahead, as they approach the bright exit at the far end of the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: water surface level view of canal

events.description: camera dips down to water level, focusing on reflective surface

agents.ego_description: camera focuses on the water surface, capturing reflections of the surrounding architecture

entered.detail: mirror-like reflections of skyscrapers and elevated highways on the water surface

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the camera dramatically dips to water level, transforming the canal into a mirror filling the frame. The reflections of elevated highways and futuristic buildings ripple gently on the water's surface, showcasing the game's ray-traced graphics.

events.description: camera rises back to normal walking height from water level

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden boardwalk past modern glass buildings with neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrians sitting on benches outside a storefront

entered.detail: planked wooden walkway along the water's edge
tall contemporary buildings with reflective glass facades
commercial establishments with glowing cyan and red neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera rises back to walking height as the character continues along a wooden boardwalk. Modern glass buildings with neon-lit storefronts line the left side, while the canal returns to its position on the right. Pedestrians relax on benches outside the commercial establishments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic waterfront that transitions from an open promenade into a neon-lit underpass before emerging into a commercial district. It begins on a sunlit path beside a calm canal reflecting distant skyscrapers and elevated highways, moving steadily toward a covered concrete underpass. As the character enters the tunnel, the open sky is replaced by overhead concrete and a mix of natural and artificial light, with the scene shifting toward vibrant neon advertisements and graffiti-covered walls. Upon exiting the underpass, the camera dramatically dips to water level to transform the canal into a mirror of rippling architectural reflections before rising back to walking height. The movement finally settles on a wooden boardwalk lined with modern glass storefronts and pedestrians relaxing on benches under the clear morning sky.
